content:
The given code is already correct. It splits the order string into an array of words using whitespace as a delimiter, then further splits each element in this array to separate out the product details and price information. The price for the product is retrieved from the priceList map with the product name (productDetails[1]). Finally, it calculates the total cost by multiplying the order quantity (orderData[1]) by the product price.

Please note that you need to ensure that the product name exists in the priceList before accessing it. If not, a NoSuchElementException will be thrown. You may want to handle this exception or provide an alternative way of retrieving the product price.
